body_txt: When there is a group of friends all the same age, generally there is the couple in the group who act as the adults, sorta the parents of the group. Together they are like the superego of the gang and are actually recognized as the " Mom " and " Dad " of their friends. The "Mom" friend would be supportive, affectionate, and wise, while the "Dad" friend would be the overprotective and scary parent who leads the group. Sometimes, the roles can switch depending on the medium and the culture the produces the work. Compare Promotion to Parent and the girl and boy in A Boy, a Girl, and a Baby Family when the group is a family.
